# Export Examples

Here are some import strings to get you started with V's Apartments. Copy the string and paste it into the Import window in the Settings tab.

## V's H10 Apartment

```
eyJ0eXBlIjoiYmF0Y2giLCJ2IjoyLCJkYXRhIjpbeyJzIjoxLCJjIjoxLCJpIjoiMTc2NjQ3Mjc0Ny0xNzgzIiwiciI6LTkzLjk1LCJkIjoxLCJwIjpbLTEzOTAuNjM5LDEyNzEuMTY3LDEyMy4wODJdLCJuIjoiVidzIEgxMCBBcGFydG1lbnQifV19
```

## V's Northside Apartment

```
eyJ0eXBlIjoiYmF0Y2giLCJ2IjoyLCJkYXRhIjpbeyJzIjozLCJjIjoxLCJpIjoiMTc2NjUyNTU2Ny01NDM0IiwiciI6MzcuNywiZCI6MSwicCI6Wy0xNTAyLjU5OSwyMjI1LjA1NSwyMi4yXSwibiI6IlYncyBOb3J0aHNpZGUgQXBhcnRtZW50In1dfQ==
```

## V's Japantown Apartment

```
eyJ0eXBlIjoiYmF0Y2giLCJ2IjoyLCJkYXRhIjpbeyJzIjo1LCJjIjoxLCJpIjoiMTc2NjUyNTcxMy00MjIyIiwiciI6OTcuODUsImQiOjIsInAiOlstNzgxLjg5MSw5NzguNjA0LDI4LjIxXSwibiI6IlYncyBKYXBhbnRvd24gQXBhcnRtZW50In1dfQ==
```

## V's Glen Apartment

```
eyJ0eXBlIjoiYmF0Y2giLCJ2IjoyLCJkYXRhIjpbeyJzIjoxMSwiYyI6MSwiaSI6IjE3NjY1MjYwNDktNzYzOSIsInIiOi0zLjA1LCJkIjo0LCJwIjpbLTE1MjUuMzg3LC05NzAuMDc0LDkuMDc0XSwibiI6IlYncyBHbGVuIEFwYXJ0bWVudCJ9XX0=
```

## V's Corpo Plaza Apartment

```
eyJ0eXBlIjoiYmF0Y2giLCJ2IjoyLCJkYXRhIjpbeyJzIjo4LCJjIjoxLCJpIjoiMTc2NjUyNjEyNS03NTIxIiwiciI6MTc4Ljc1LCJkIjozLCJwIjpbLTE2MDYuNSwzNjIuMDgxLDQ5LjIxXSwibiI6IlYncyBDb3JwbyBQbGF6YSBBcGFydG1lbnQifV19
```

## V's Dogtown Apartment

```
eyJ0eXBlIjoiYmF0Y2giLCJ2IjoyLCJkYXRhIjpbeyJzIjo5OSwiYyI6MSwiaSI6IjE3NjY1MjYyNTAtNTIxNCIsInIiOi0xMzYuNjUsImQiOjgsInAiOlstMjIzOS44NiwtMjU1My44ODIsODAuMzAxXSwibiI6IlYncyBEb2d0b3duIEFwYXJ0bWVudCJ9XX0=
```

## All vanilla apartments

This string imports all the vanilla and DLC apartments. The location for each is just outside the entry to the apartment.

```

```

## "Custom" AV

A fully tricked out, custom AV available in the base game.

```
eyJ0eXBlIjoiYmF0Y2giLCJ2IjoyLCJkYXRhIjpbeyJzIjo2LCJkZXNjIjoiQSBmdWxseSB0aWNrZWQgb3V0LCBjdXN0b20gQVYiLCJjIjoxOCwiaSI6IjE3NjgxNzQ3NjUtMTIyNiIsInIiOjIuMTA3LCJkIjoyLCJwIjpbMjMwLjc4NCwtMTY5LjEwNCw0MC4zNzVdLCJuIjoiXCJDdXN0b21cIiBBViJ9XX0=
```
